# knowledge\business\products\Asrtion Remote README.md

# Astrion Remote

Smart Control. Simplified.

Astrion Remote is a customizable smart home controller built for seamless
integration with Home Assistant and modern automation ecosystems.

---

## ✨ Highlights

- Native Home Assistant Integration
- Fully Customizable Interface
- Scene & Automation Control
- Local-First Architecture
- OTA Firmware Updates
- Installer Friendly

---

## 📦 What Is Astrion?

Astrion Remote is designed to replace traditional wall panels, tablets,
and remotes with a unified smart control interface.

Control:

- Lighting
- Curtains
- Media Systems
- Climate
- Smart Scenes
- Dashboards

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

1. Power on Astrion Remote
2. Connect to Wi-Fi
3. Discover device in Home Assistant
4. Assign entities & scenes
5. Enjoy smart control

---

## 📘 Documentation

Full documentation available here:

- Forum: https://forum.sanytron.com
- Manuals: https://store.sanytron.com/support/manuals

---

## 🤝 Community

Facebook Page:
https://www.facebook.com/sanytron.control

Community Group:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/sanytron

---

## 🛠 Support

Email: necast@msn.com  
WhatsApp / Telegram: +86-138-2337-9099

---

© Sanytron

---

# knowledge\business\products\Astrion Remoet INSTALLER_GUIDE.md
# Astrion Remote — Installer Guide

## Overview

This guide is intended for installers, integrators, and advanced users.

Astrion Remote acts as a smart control endpoint connected directly
to Home Assistant.

---

## Installation Workflow

1. Physical Installation
2. Network Configuration
3. Home Assistant Integration
4. UI Assignment
5. User Handover

---

## 1. Physical Installation

Recommended locations:

- Wall switch position
- Bedside controller
- Entrance scene

# knowledge\business\products\Astrion Remote Integrate HOME_ASSISTANT_SETUP.md
# Astrion Remote + Home Assistant Setup

## Requirements

- Running Home Assistant
- Local network access
- Astrion powered on

---

## Device Discovery

1. Open Home Assistant
2. Go to Settings
3. Devices & Services
4. Click Add Integration

Astrion should auto-discover.

---

## Entity Assignment

Recommended entities:

- Lights
- Covers
- Climate
- Media Players
- Scripts
- Scenes

---
